programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Jalen Hurts lets it fly as A.J. Brown and DeVonta Smith combine for 304 yards and 3 touchdowns as the Eagles outscore a Carson Wentz-led Vikings team 28-22.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Drake Maye threw 3 second-half touchdown passes to help the Patriots overcome defensive end Myles Garrett's 5 sacks, erase an early deficit, and roll to their fifth straight victory over the Cleveland Browns on Sunday.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.sub-title: 25 Elite Players Traded In Their Prime
programme.desc: See which NFL superstars were shockingly traded at the peak of their careers.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Younghoe Koo's 52-yard field goal as time expired in regulation forced overtime, and Cousins took care of the rest as he set a franchise record with 509 passing yards to lift Atlanta (3-2) into a tie atop the division.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: The Giants and Cowboys duel in an NFC East classic showdown that features six lead changes in the fourth quarter and overtime as Russell Wilson and Malik Nabers look to outshine Dak Prescott and CeeDee Lamb.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Chicago Bears quarterback Caleb Williams threw for three touchdowns, and Chicago beat the Pittsburgh Steelers 31-28 in a matchup of division leaders on Sunday while Rodgers, the Bears' old nemesis, was sidelined with a broken left wrist.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Miami keeps their playoff hopes alive as the Dolphins overcame 8- and 3-point fourth-quarter deficits, as well as one of Aaron Rodgers' best games in years, to beat the Jets, 32-26.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Carolina Panthers running back Rico Dowdle exacted revenge on his former team and notched 239 scrimmage yards, the most ever of any Panther in franchise history, supplanting Christian McCaffrey.

programme.title: Game of the Week
programme.desc: Jahmyr Gibbs and David Montgomery ran for two touchdowns apiece, Detroit sacked Lamar Jackson seven times and the Lions bullied their way to a 38-30 win over Baltimore on Monday night.

programme.title: GolfPass

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.sub-title: Six in One, Half-Dozen in the Other
programme.desc: Together six men and six women comprise two teams for the ultimate prize of $100,000 and a chance to play in a PGA Tour or LPGA tournament. Featuring Golf Channel's Blair O'Neal.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: One on one, man versus woman, and in the blazing heat of the Dominican Republic, the teams try to keep their composure while competing in the dangerously new challenge Strike Eraser. Featuring Golf Channel's Blair O'Neal.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.sub-title: Kill Two Birds With One Stone
programme.desc: One team loses a competitor after that player must leave for the hospital due to illness. The stakes get higher when the Flop Wall now leads two competitors to the benching challenge. Featuring Golf Channel's Blair O'Neal.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Both teams try their luck in "Take a Chance" and battle for their professional lives. Players are subject to the "Benching Challenge" where cash and elimination are on the line. Featuring Golf Channel's Blair O'Neal.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The ups and downs of the grueling competition are wearing on the teams as a multitude of events are staged. You can cut the tension with a knife as both teams fall victim to internal fighting that might start to derail the weaker players.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: An overnight rain delay causes more tension when a couple of players must wait another day to compete. Finally, both teams go head-to-head to beat elimination and win cash. Featuring Golf Channel's Blair O'Neal.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The teams compete in an "Around the World" challenge testing their chipping and putting skills. As the drama unfolds, some friends turn to enemies and survival is put to the test as the teams try to make it one step closer to the finale.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.sub-title: Birds of a Feather Flock Together
programme.desc: Two players become the clear-cut MVPs, while the rest of the competitors do their best to make up lost ground. It's every player for themselves as a short game and closest to the pin challenge result in two unlikely winners.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The most points in any competition are at stake and a player falls ill creating a make-or-break situation for the teams.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: In the finale, the men's and women's team battle it out for cash, prizes and professional exemptions.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Sara Brown graced Golf Channel screens with strong runs at Big Break Sandals and Big Break Dominican Republic; she is running a family, occasionally herding preschoolers and being the ultimate team mom for her husband’s other successful squad.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: From challenging lies to putting errant shots back on track and more, Rory offers up his approach to handling the kinds of shots and strategy that can improve scores and impress golf buddies.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy answers questions from GolfPass members about how to hit shots around trees, techniques for downhill bunker lies and the keys to hitting flighted wedge shots.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy joins Chris Como to answer questions covering how to get more distance, the keys to hitting fairway woods, how to play shots from the rough and much more.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy joins Chris Como to answer questions covering distance keys, his pre-shot routine, shot shaping and playing in windy conditions.

programme.title: Build a Better Game
programme.desc: Focusing on priming the setup and utilizing ground force to increase driving distance.

programme.title: Build a Better Game: Head to Toe With Martin Hall
programme.sub-title: Build a Better Game: Head to Toe With Martin Hall
programme.desc: The feet are pivotal in the swing for balance and proper weight shift; Martin explains how the feet should sequence during the swing and offers drills for proper movement and balance.

programme.title: Build a Better Game: Head to Toe With Martin Hall
programme.sub-title: Build a Better Game: Head to Toe With Martin Hall
programme.desc: Martin shows how the knees should flex and straighten throughout the swing to maintain power and balance.

programme.title: Glam Golf With Blair O'Neal
programme.desc: Blair O'Neal competes against Lucy Robson on the Riverside course at Portstewart Golf Club in Northern Ireland.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Rocco Mediate shares his best tips and unique drills. Rocco talks about how learning to top the ball on purpose can help you become a better ball striker.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Rocco Mediate talks the short game and how you can master feel around the greens by using the bounce of your wedge.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Host Martin Hall talks to Ryder Cup stalwart Padraig Harrington about his approach to his golf swing.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Padraig Harrington talks how to hit the driver better, farther, and with more accuracy.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Padraig Harrington talks how to chip, pitch, and improve your bunker shots. Harrington shares secrets on the short game and how using a variety of clubs will help lower your scores.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Padraig Harrington talks all things putting and shares tips on how to putt better to lower score.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: 3 Keys to Every Shot
programme.desc: Chris uses his expertise to break down some of the most difficult shots in golf into three simple keys.

programme.title: 3 Keys to Every Shot
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty analyzes the swings of Rory McIlroy, Collin Morikawa and Jon Rahm to teach the three keys to a variety of challenging golf shots.

programme.title: 3 Keys to Every Shot
programme.desc: Learn how to hit shots into the wind, hit low fades with irons and dial in distance on awkward 50-yard pitch shots.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to play links-style golf like an Open Champion. Learn how to handle the wind like 5-time Open Champion Tom Watson, get up-and-down around the green like 3-time Open Champion Gary Player.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the shots made famous by Open Champions at St. Andrews. Learn how to hit powerful draws like Tiger Woods, escape the rough like Seve Ballesteros, and stick wedges like John Daly.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Playing in the Wind
programme.sub-title: Playing Downwind and Into the Wind
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty breaks down the art of playing downwind and into the wind. Nick will guide you through techniques to maximize distance, control trajectory, and adjust your club selection to take full advantage of the wind.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Playing in the Wind
programme.sub-title: Right to Left Left to Right
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty teaches techniques and tips for achieving excellent golf performance when playing into the wind. He shows how to maximize distance, control trajectory, and adjust club selection to make the most of the weather conditions.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Instructor Chris Como is on a journey to explore golf's leading teachers and influencers who are shaping the game for future generations. Como travels the world in search of the culture, philosophy, and technology of successful players and coaches.
